warnings: MET emits a recommendation signal only. SLO/CDE/SEL retain canonical authority over budgets, control, and enforcement.
Where budget posture is unknown, the recommendation_signal stays no_recommendation rather than asserting a freeze need.
failure_prevented: MET emitting freeze language as if it had authority — bypassing SLO/CDE/SEL ownership.
signal_improved: Each freeze recommendation signal points at SLO/CDE/SEL, names the source artifacts, and stays no_recommendation when evidence is missing.

recommendation_signals.next_recommended_input: Retrieve SLO 30d consumed_ratio; if breach is observed, hand the signal to SLO/CDE — never enforce from MET.
Retrieve SLO 7d consumed_ratio; CDE/SEL retain freeze authority.
